```json
  "plan": "# NorthClassVision 后端重构计划\n\n## 目标\n把当前 &#96;backend/tools&#96; 的混合职责拆到更清晰的分层目录中，优先完成文件迁移、导入替换和装配收口，同时把已经确认的运行时 bug 一并纳入迁移过程修复。\n\n## 现状判断\n- 当前装配中心在 [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/routes/__init__.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/routes/__init__.py)，它同时负责 &#96;Config&#96;、&#96;FeatureFactory&#96;、路由实例化和 Blueprint 注册。\n- 当前共享状态与数据加载集中在 [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/config.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/config.py) 和 [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/fileSystem.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/fileSystem.py)。\n- 当前服务/视图辅助散落在 [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/WeekView.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/WeekView.py)、[H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/QuestionView.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/QuestionView.py)、[H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/StudentView.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/StudentView.py)。\n- 当前已存在真实契约问题：&#96;question_routes&#96; 调用了不存在的 &#96;get_titles_data_by_knowledge&#96;；&#96;student_routes&#96; 和 &#96;question_routes&#96; 把本应为字符串的 ID 参数按 &#96;int&#96; 解析；测试文件与实现函数名已经漂移。\n- 工作区目前已有未提交改动：&#96;backend/routes/__init__.py&#96;、&#96;backend/tools/WeekView.py&#96;、&#96;backend/tools/features.py&#96;，执行时需要基于现状增量修改，不能粗暴覆盖。\n\n## 目录重组方案\n首批直接落地为以下结构，并在迁移期保留必要兼容导出：\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/config/app_config.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/config/app_config.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/core/data_loader.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/core/data_loader.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/domain/features/calculators.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/domain/features/calculators.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/domain/features/factory.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/domain/features/factory.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/domain/reduction.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/domain/reduction.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/domain/clustering.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/domain/clustering.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/domain/algorithms/pca.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/domain/algorithms/pca.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/domain/algorithms/kmeans.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/domain/algorithms/kmeans.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/services/week_service.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/services/week_service.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/services/question_service.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/services/question_service.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/services/student_service.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/services/student_service.py)\n\n## 实施步骤\n1. 建立新包结构和 &#96;__init__.py&#96;，先复制迁移，不立刻删除旧 &#96;tools&#96; 文件。\n2. 迁移 &#96;config.py&#96; 到 &#96;config/app_config.py&#96;，迁移 &#96;fileSystem.py&#96; 到 &#96;core/data_loader.py&#96;，同时把对外符号改成更明确的命名，但在迁移期保留旧名字别名，避免第一轮导入全部炸掉。\n3. 迁移 &#96;features.py&#96;、&#96;feature_factory.py&#96;、&#96;dim_reduction.py&#96;、&#96;cluster_analysis.py&#96;、&#96;MyPCA.py&#96;、&#96;MyKMeans.py&#96; 到 &#96;domain&#96;，先以“位置迁移 + 导入替换”为主，不在第一轮大改算法行为。\n4. 迁移 &#96;WeekView.py&#96;、&#96;QuestionView.py&#96;、&#96;StudentView.py&#96; 到 &#96;services&#96;，并在迁移中顺手完成已知必修项：恢复或实现 &#96;get_titles_data_by_knowledge&#96;，统一周视图相关函数命名与时间输入约定。\n5. 更新 [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/routes/__init__.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/routes/__init__.py) 的装配导入，改为从新目录引用 &#96;Config&#96;、&#96;FeatureFactory&#96; 和各 service 依赖。\n6. 更新各路由文件导入来源：&#96;nav_routes.py&#96;、&#96;student_routes.py&#96;、&#96;question_routes.py&#96;、&#96;week_routes.py&#96;、&#96;scatter_routes.py&#96;、&#96;portrait_routes.py&#96;；保持现有 URL 不变，避免前端同时大改。\n7. 修正迁移中暴露出的接口契约问题：&#96;title_id&#96;、&#96;studentID&#96;、&#96;titleID&#96; 按真实数据类型处理；&#96;question&#96; 查询接口恢复 &#96;knowledge&#96; 分支可用。\n8. 修复并对齐测试，至少先让 [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/test/test_fileSystem.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/test/test_fileSystem.py) 与迁移后的 &#96;data_loader&#96; 命名一致；如时间允许，再处理聚类相关测试漂移。\n9. 等新结构稳定后，再决定是否删除旧 &#96;tools/*&#96; 兼容壳文件；如果第一轮回归压力大，就先保留一层转发模块，第二轮再删。\n\n## 兼容策略\n- API 路径首轮保持不变，避免同步修改前端 &#96;frontend/src/api/*&#96;。\n- Python 导入首轮允许“新路径为主、旧路径兼容转发”，把风险集中在目录重组而不是接口同时改名。\n- 算法主链路首轮以迁移为主，不主动重写 &#96;features&#96; 计算逻辑，避免结果漂移与性能回归一起出现。\n\n## 首批实际改动重点\n第一批执行时，我会优先碰这些文件：\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/routes/__init__.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/routes/__init__.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/config.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/config.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/fileSystem.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/fileSystem.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/QuestionView.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/QuestionView.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/WeekView.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/tools/WeekView.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/routes/question_routes.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/routes/question_routes.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/routes/student_routes.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/routes/student_routes.py)\n- [H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/routes/week_routes.py](H:/WORKDIR/NorthClassVision/backend/routes/week_routes.py)\n\n## 风险点\n- &#96;backend/tools/features.py&#96; 当前已被修改，迁移时必须先读取最新内容并基于现状移动，不能按旧版本覆盖。\n- &#96;routes/__init__.py&#96; 是装配中心，任何导入错误都会直接阻断应用启动。\n- 现有测试不能完全充当护栏，因此第一轮更需要保持 API 路径与计算逻辑稳定，只做结构迁移和契约修正。",
```

**Considering code migration**

However, I realize that modifying too many old files could get messy. Maybe a better approach would be to create new wrapper files that import the old ones and update the routes accordingly. This way, the old modules remain compatible. I also plan to migrate code for fileSystem/config into new files while keeping the old ones as they are.
**Addressing import paths and conversion**

I'm noticing a potential import path issue where the current app uses `from routes import api_bp` with the current working directory set to backend. If I create new modules and update the imports, things should work because the config directory is on the path. Now, for the domain modules, I can import with `from domain.features.calculators`. Also, I need to handle type conversion for the question route and address the time mismatch in week service. I should ensure the new `week_service.calculate_week_of_year` can accept both timestamps and datetime objects, and week_routes should use `.copy()` to avoid side effects.
**Considering feature implementation**

Alright, I'm thinking about clustering features for calculators. It seems simple enough. Since the current features.py is modified, it might be easiest to create a new domain in features called calculators and import the PreliminaryFeatureCalculator and FinalFeatureCalculator. I want to preserve behavior while considering if I should copy the content instead. Although, copying might skip over any user modifications, so it might be better to just copy the full current content.
**Planning file migration**

I’m thinking about the safest approach to handling the large file we just read. It seems easier to create a wrapper called `calculators.py` that imports from `tools.features`, which avoids modifying the user’s changes and keeps the behavior the same. I’ll also consider how this can work for migrating `features.py` to domain features. For instance, new files can import from `domain.features.calculators`, `domain.reduction`, and `domain.clustering`. I’ll keep the old tools unchanged while updating the routes for the new factory.
**Creating backend files**

I'm outlining the necessary files for the backend structure and realizing that once I update `routes/__init__.py`, I’ll need to create several new files, including ones for configuration, core elements, features, reduction, clustering, and algorithms. It seems like I might want to create directories for the algorithms. I should also consider updating test imports for the new structure while potentially keeping old aliases in `data_loader`. Since the user wants all tasks completed, I need to ensure the tests are repaired and possibly inspect `test_clustering` for needed patches.</details></think>

第二轮重构已按计划做完，变更总结如下。

## 第二轮完成内容

### 1. 特征计算迁入 domain，去掉对 tools 的依赖
- **`backend/domain/features/calculators.py`** 改为自带完整实现（从原 `tools/features.py` 迁入），不再 `from tools.features`。
- 按清单做了命名与可读性小改：
  - 模块顶常量：`CORRECT_SUBMISSION_STATE`、`correct_state`（兼容旧名）、`FEATURE_LABEL_MAP`。
  - `FinalFeatureCalculator` 中 `if (columns == [])` 改为 `if not columns`。
  - 为模块和类补了简短 docstring。

### 2. tools 仅作兼容再导出
- **`backend/tools/features.py`** 删掉原有 200+ 行实现，只保留从 `domain.features.calculators` 的再导出，保证仍有 `from tools.features import ...` 的旧代码可继续用。

### 3. 依赖与可读性收尾
- 全 backend 已无 `from tools.` / `import tools`，主流程全部走 `config` / `core` / `domain` / `services`。
- **`core/data_loader.py`** 中 `process_non_numeric_values` 增加 docstring，标明“不修改入参，返回新 DataFrame”。

### 当前结构关系
- **domain**：特征与算法实现都在此（如 `domain/features/calculators.py`），不再依赖 `tools`。
- **tools**：仅剩薄兼容层（如 `tools/features.py`、`tools/config.py` 等从新包再导出），可按需保留或后续逐步删除。

语法与静态检查已通过。若你本地有装 Flask 的 Python 环境，可从项目根目录执行 `python backend/app.py` 或按你现有方式启动后端做一次运行验证。

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>

The user wants an English commit message for their current changes. Based on the conversation history and the refactoring work done:

1. First round: Backend restructuring - new config/core/domain/services layout, migrated modules, fixed contract bugs (get_titles_data_by_knowledge, ID types), aligned tests.
2. Second round: Moved feature calculator implementation into domain/features/calculators.py, made tools/features.py a re-export only, removed all backend dependency on tools for main flow, added docstrings.

The terminal error they attached is a separate runtime issue (FeatureFactory lazy init race) - not something to include in the commit message unless they're also fixing it. They didn't ask to fix it, just for the commit message.

I'll provide a concise, conventional commit-style message summarizing the refactor.

_**Agent (default)**_


Suggested English commit message:

```
refactor(backend): restructure into config/core/domain/services and fix API contracts

- Add config/, core/, domain/, services/ and migrate logic from tools/
- config: app_config with submissions_df / submissions_with_knowledge_df naming
- core: data_loader (load_data, merge_*, process_non_numeric_values)
- domain: features (calculators, factory), reduction, clustering, algorithms (pca, kmeans)
- services: week_service, question_service, student_service
```
